sources.name: awesome-gpt-image-2
sources.summary: Prompt-as-Code style structural templates distilled from GPT-Image-2 cases.

sources.name: awesome-gpt-image-2-prompts
sources.summary: Curated GPT-Image-2 case gallery across ecommerce, ads, portraits, UI, posters, and community tests.

presets.title: 电商主图协议
presets.prompt: Generate a production-ready ecommerce hero image for {product}. Keep the product as the visual anchor, describe material and texture clearly, use {brand_colors} as restrained brand accents, show 1-2 selling points from {features}, and keep commercial copy minimal and readable. Lighting should create clear highlights, shadows, and premium product separation.
presets.example: 高端护肤精华瓶电商主图，磨砂玻璃、银色泵头，黑金品牌色，补水和敏感肌可用两个卖点。

presets.title: 美妆试色报告
presets.prompt: Create a vertical beauty recommendation report for {product}. First infer skin tone, temperament, and lip baseline from the reference image when available. Then show a structured lipstick or makeup recommendation matrix with 3-5 options, consistent face identity, precise color swatches, premium editorial layout, and small brand accents in {brand_colors}.
presets.example: 基于自拍生成 YSL 口红推荐报告，通勤、显白、气场三类色号对比，黑金高端版式。

presets.title: 商业海报协议
presets.prompt: Design a finished commercial poster for {product}. Use one strong visual metaphor, a clear hierarchy with title, subtitle, and minimal supporting copy, and a color system based on {brand_colors}. The composition should be campaign-ready, with readable text, intentional whitespace, and no crowded collage.
presets.example: 夏季新品上市海报，主视觉是一瓶冰镇饮料和飞溅柑橘，标题清楚，3:4 社媒版。

presets.title: 概念字体海报
presets.prompt: Create one premium conceptual typography poster for the exact title in the user request: {user_prompt}. Typography is the hero and must be readable, dominant, and expressive. Convert the meaning into one visual metaphor, use a restrained 4-6 color system, refined editorial composition, paper or ink texture, and avoid extra unrelated readable text.
presets.example: 为「疾风起」做一张 9:16 高级概念字体海报，狂草速度感，克制配色。

presets.title: 信息图协议
presets.prompt: Generate a Chinese infographic about {product}. Use a title area plus 3-5 modules, each with a short heading, icon-like visual cue, and one concise sentence. Choose a clear structure such as flowchart, comparison, timeline, or relationship map. Prioritize readable Chinese text and controlled information density.
presets.example: 生成咖啡机工作原理信息图：水路、研磨、萃取、奶泡四个模块，中文清晰。

presets.title: 极简科普海报
presets.prompt: Create a premium minimal science poster for {product}. Use a pure white or very light background, one enlarged hero subject, soft studio shadows, and a restrained bottom information area with four compact columns. The result should feel like an Apple keynote science visual rather than a busy traditional infographic.
presets.example: 稀有昆虫科普海报，主体超高清放大，底部四个简洁信息栏目。

presets.title: 品牌身份系统
presets.prompt: Create a compact brand identity board for {product}. Include logo direction, color palette, typography direction, auxiliary graphic language, and 3-4 application mockups. Start from brand keywords in {features}, use {brand_colors}, and show rules that make the identity reusable across app icon, packaging, social post, and business card.
presets.example: 为本地咖啡品牌做品牌身份板：温暖、手作、城市感，包含杯套和 App 图标。

presets.title: 写实摄影协议
presets.prompt: Create a hyper-realistic photograph of {product}. Specify camera language, lens feel, lighting direction, depth of field, natural imperfections, material details, and realistic environmental cues. Use subtle grain, believable shadows, and avoid overly perfect AI-polished surfaces.
presets.example: 35mm 纪实风咖啡馆产品照，雨夜窗边，浅景深，杯壁有真实水汽。

presets.title: 高保真 UI 截图
presets.prompt: Generate a high-fidelity mobile UI screenshot for {product}. Define platform, core features, top navigation, content cards, bottom tabs, color system from {brand_colors}, and readable Chinese UI text. The layout should look like a real shipped app screen, not a landing page.
presets.example: 健身 App 今日训练页，深色模式，底部 tab，跑步、热量、力量训练卡片。

presets.title: 角色设定表
presets.prompt: Create a character design sheet for {product}. Include front, side, back or pose variations, 3-5 expressions, outfit/material callouts, and a consistent style guide. Keep the same character identity across all panels and avoid changing facial features between views.
presets.example: 赛博快递员角色设定表，三视图、表情、装备细节、蓝橙配色。

presets.title: 黑金香水广告
presets.prompt: Create a luxury perfume-style product advertisement for {product}: centered glass or polished packaging, glossy black marble or deep reflective surface, warm golden highlights, elegant smoke or atmospheric bloom, high-contrast premium beauty campaign lighting, crisp focus, refined black-and-gold palette.
presets.example: 经典矩形香水瓶，琥珀色液体，黑色大理石台面，金色高光。

presets.title: 柔和护肤棚拍
presets.prompt: Create a soft skincare studio shot for {product}: matte podium, gentle gradient background, silky foam or water texture, botanical accents relevant to the formula, pastel or cream color palette from {brand_colors}, clean label emphasis, calm organic care mood.
presets.example: 米白色泵瓶站在磨砂圆台上，洋甘菊和泡沫围绕，淡黄色渐变背景。

presets.title: 热带汽水海报
presets.prompt: Create a vibrant tropical commercial poster for {product}: a cold bottle or can with condensation, citrus slices and splash motion, glowing yellow-orange liquid cues, bright summer advertising energy, readable product name, and clean social-commerce composition.
presets.example: 柑橘汽水瓶倾斜居中，橙子切片飞溅，明亮夏日广告。

presets.title: 工业设计展示板
presets.prompt: Create an industrial design presentation board for {product}. Show hero render, exploded components or feature callouts, material notes, dimensions or usage diagram, neutral technical layout, precise arrows, and restrained engineering-style typography.
presets.example: AI 眼镜工业设计板，主渲染、爆炸结构、镜腿芯片、传感器标注。

presets.title: 耳机卖点信息图
presets.prompt: Create an ecommerce infographic for {product}. Use a central product render, 4-6 clean benefit callouts, icons for noise reduction, battery, comfort, waterproofing, or sound quality, and a tech retail palette using {brand_colors}. Keep every label short and readable.
presets.example: 无线耳机主图信息图，降噪、36h 续航、轻量佩戴、防水四个卖点。

presets.title: 街头服饰 Campaign
presets.prompt: Create a streetwear or sports fashion campaign for {product}. Use strong model pose, bold crop, reflective or urban surface, brand-colored accents from {brand_colors}, editorial lighting, and either a single hero visual or a controlled triptych layout. Keep the apparel silhouette and product details recognizable.
presets.example: 运动鞋街头广告，低角度模特姿态，湿地反光，黑白红品牌色。

presets.title: 直播带货截图
presets.prompt: Create a realistic mobile livestream commerce screenshot for {product}. Include presenter area, product card, live comments, likes or floating reactions, price badge, limited-time CTA, and platform-like UI chrome. Keep Chinese interface text readable and avoid overcrowding.
presets.example: 口红直播间截图，主播试色，右下角商品卡，限时券和中文弹幕。

presets.title: 产品落地页截图
presets.prompt: Create a realistic web landing page screenshot for {product}. Use a polished product hero, clear navigation, concise value proposition, pricing or CTA area, feature blocks, and brand colors from {brand_colors}. The result should look like a real responsive product website screen capture.
presets.example: AI 会议助手官网首屏截图，产品界面占视觉中心，清晰 CTA 和功能卡。

presets.title: 数码硬件棚拍
presets.prompt: Create a premium technology product studio shot for {product}. Use precise 3/4 angle, matte and metallic material contrast, edge rim lighting, subtle glow accents, clean dark or neutral backdrop, and sharp detail on ports, seams, labels, and engineered surfaces.
presets.example: 高端游戏主板棚拍，黑灰金属散热片，蓝色轮廓光，接口清晰。

presets.title: 微缩场景广告
presets.prompt: Create a miniature diorama advertisement for {product}. Treat the product as a giant object in a tiny world, add miniature people or props that explain benefits from {features}, use playful scale contrast, clean commercial lighting, and a polished product-first composition.
presets.example: 护肤瓶变成微缩水疗馆，小人围绕喷泉和植物，突出补水修护。

presets.title: 自然人像精修
presets.prompt: Retouch the uploaded portrait into a premium natural portrait. Preserve exact identity: facial structure, eye shape, nose bridge, lip contour, jawline, age, hairstyle, hair color, moles, freckles, and distinguishing features. Improve: lighting balance, exposure correction, white balance, skin tone evenness, flyaway hair cleanup, background decluttering, eye brightness and catchlights, teeth whitening if visible. Keep: realistic pores, subtle skin texture, natural micro-wrinkles, visible hair strands. Do NOT: change face shape, alter eye size, smooth skin to plastic, add makeup, change age, swap features, or reshape body.
guardrails: 不改变脸型和五官比例
presets.example: 上传自拍后做自然精修：肤色更均匀、光线更柔和、背景简洁，但保留真实皮肤纹理。

presets.title: 电影感人像
presets.prompt: Transform the uploaded portrait into a cinematic editorial photograph. Preserve exact facial identity and proportions. Apply: 35mm or 50mm lens perspective, f/1.4-f/2.0 shallow depth of field, directional key light with natural falloff, motivated practical lights (neon, streetlamp, window), subtle film grain (ISO 400-800), color grading with lifted shadows and rolled-off highlights, halation around bright sources, environmental atmosphere (rain, fog, bokeh lights). Skin must retain realistic texture with visible pores. Frame as a 3/4 or portrait crop with intentional negative space.
presets.example: 把普通自拍变成夜晚街头电影感人像：霓虹侧光、浅景深、CineStill 800T 胶片质感。

presets.title: 奢华美妆人像
presets.prompt: Create a luxury beauty campaign portrait from the uploaded reference. Preserve exact facial identity. Upgrade to: professional makeup (refined base, defined brows, subtle contour, lip color matching {brand_colors}), polished hair with intentional flyaways for realism, studio beauty lighting (large soft key + fill + hair light + background light), editorial pose with chin angle and gaze direction. Use {brand_colors} as the campaign palette. Skin must show realistic texture under beauty light — visible pores on nose and forehead, natural under-eye area, no plastic smoothing. Output quality: magazine cover, beauty brand campaign level.
guardrails: 皮肤在柔光下仍保留纹理
发丝要精致但有自然碎发
presets.example: 参考自拍生成高端美妆棚拍：柔光、干净妆面、发丝精致、适合口红/护肤广告。

presets.title: 胶片黑雾写真
presets.prompt: Convert the uploaded portrait into a soft film portrait. Preserve exact identity. Emulate Fujifilm Pro 400H or Kodak Portra 400 film stock characteristics: soft pastel color palette, slightly faded blacks (lifted shadow floor), gentle green-yellow cast in midtones, warm skin tones, fine organic grain structure, subtle highlight bloom from Black Pro-Mist 1/4 filter. Lighting: diffused window light from one side, low contrast ratio (1:2), soft shadows with visible detail. Framing: intimate candid crop, rule of thirds with gaze direction, slight overexposure (+0.5 to +1 EV). Natural minimal makeup, relaxed expression, no posed smile.
presets.example: 把自拍变成 9:16 日系胶片写真：窗边柔光、黑雾高光、Fuji Pro 400H 色调。

presets.title: 同脸九宫格写真
presets.prompt: Create a 3x3 portrait contact sheet from the uploaded reference. 100% identity consistency across all 9 frames: same face, same age, same hairstyle, same hair color, same skin tone. Each frame varies ONLY in: pose (front/3/4/profile/over-shoulder/seated/leaning), gaze (camera/left/right/down/up), expression (neutral/slight smile/laughing/thoughtful/confident/relaxed), and crop (headshot/bust/waist). Wardrobe consistent or one cohesive outfit change. Lighting: unified soft studio or window light across all frames. Grid: thin white or light gray dividers, equal cell sizes. Texture: visible skin pores in each frame, no plastic smoothing.
presets.example: 上传头像生成同脸九宫格：正脸、侧脸、回眸、微笑、坐姿等 9 种变化。

presets.title: 棚拍服装变身
presets.prompt: Transform the uploaded person into a luxury studio fashion portrait. Preserve exact face identity, body proportions, and posture. Replace outfit with: {features} — describe specific garment type, fabric (silk, wool, cotton, leather, denim, sequin, tulle), texture detail, fit and drape, and styling accessories. Studio setup: clean seamless backdrop in {brand_colors} tones, professional fashion lighting (large soft key + rim + optional fill), hair restyled to complement outfit. Pose: editorial fashion direction, confident but natural. Full-body or half-body crop with intentional negative space. Skin texture must be visible on exposed areas.
presets.example: 上传日常照变成高级棚拍造型：黑色丝绒西装、缎面衬衫、金色配饰、深灰背景。

presets.title: 旧照修复上色
presets.prompt: Restore the uploaded old or damaged photograph. Preserve: original people's identities, poses, expressions, period-appropriate clothing and hairstyles, emotional atmosphere. Repair: scratches, creases, stains, water damage, torn areas, faded contrast, color shifts, dust spots, paper texture artifacts. Enhance: sharpness and detail recovery, noise reduction while preserving film grain character, dynamic range restoration. If black-and-white: add tasteful natural colorization with historically accurate colors for the era, warm skin tones, period-appropriate clothing colors, natural environment tones. Do NOT: modernize clothing, change hairstyles, add invented elements, or alter the composition.
guardrails: 保留年代感和历史真实性
修复损伤但不重画人物
presets.example: 上传老照片后修复折痕和褪色、自然上色，保留旧照片的温度和年代感。

presets.title: 照片风格复刻
presets.prompt: Analyze the uploaded reference photo across these dimensions: (1) Camera: focal length, aperture, sensor/film type, distance to subject. (2) Lighting: key direction, quality (hard/soft), color temperature, fill ratio, practical lights. (3) Color: palette, grading style, shadow/midtone/highlight tones, saturation profile. (4) Composition: crop type, rule of thirds/golden ratio, leading lines, negative space. (5) Environment: background type, depth, atmosphere. (6) Styling: wardrobe direction, hair, accessories. Then generate a new portrait of {product} using ALL extracted parameters while preserving the subject's identity. If reference is a mood image (not the subject), match only the style.
guardrails: 身份和风格要分开处理
不要照搬参考图上的文字
presets.example: 上传喜欢的人像照片，反推镜头/光线/构图参数，再用同样风格生成全新头像。

presets.title: 社媒头像大片
presets.prompt: Create a polished social media avatar from the uploaded portrait. Preserve exact identity. Optimize for: strong face visibility at small sizes (head and shoulders crop, face occupies 60-70% of frame), clean simple background (solid color or very soft gradient in {brand_colors}), sharp eye focus with visible catchlights, even skin tone, well-groomed hair, confident natural expression. Platform-specific guidance: WeChat — warm approachable tone, slight smile; Xiaohongshu — editorial trendy feel, subtle styling; LinkedIn — professional trustworthy, business casual or formal; Douyin — youthful energetic, creative angle. Avoid: heavy beauty filters, distorted face shape, fake teeth, waxy skin, busy backgrounds, extreme crops.
presets.example: 上传自拍生成适合微信/小红书/LinkedIn 的 1:1 高级头像，背景干净、眼神清晰。

presets.title: AI 证件照
presets.prompt: Create a professional ID photo from the uploaded portrait. Preserve exact facial identity, proportions, and skin characteristics. Requirements: (1) Pose: front-facing, shoulders square to camera, neutral or slight smile expression, eyes directly at camera, ears visible if possible. (2) Background: {brand_colors} — specify solid white (#FFFFFF), light blue (#438EDB), gray (#C8C8C8), or red (#D03B3B). (3) Lighting: even flat lighting with no harsh shadows on face or background, soft fill to eliminate under-eye shadows. (4) Clothing: {features} — formal suit, business casual, school uniform, or keep original if already appropriate. (5) Crop: standard ID photo ratio, head centered, top of head to chin occupying 70-80% of frame height. (6) Quality: sharp focus on face, no motion blur, clean background edge around hair. Do NOT: retouch skin excessively, change face shape, alter features, add glamour effects.
presets.example: 上传自拍生成白底正装证件照，面部居中、光线均匀、背景纯净，符合证件照规范。

presets.title: 情侣写真
presets.prompt: Create a romantic couple portrait photoshoot from the uploaded reference. If one person is shown, generate a complementary partner that matches in style and era. Preserve exact identity of the original person(s). Style direction: {features} — options include: (A) Cinematic night: neon city lights, shallow DOF, warm-cool contrast, film grain. (B) Japanese soft film: window light, pastel tones, candid intimate moment, Fuji 400H feel. (C) Korean editorial: clean studio, soft key light, coordinated outfits, magazine quality. (D) Golden hour: warm backlight, lens flare, natural outdoor setting, romantic atmosphere. Both people must have: realistic skin texture, natural interaction (holding hands, foreheads touching, walking together), consistent lighting on both faces, no AI artifacts on hands or fingers.
presets.example: 上传单人照生成电影感情侣写真：霓虹街头、自然互动、浅景深、温暖色调。

presets.title: 古风写真
presets.prompt: Transform the uploaded portrait into a traditional Chinese aesthetic photograph. Preserve exact facial identity. Style direction: {features} — options include: (A) 汉服仕女: flowing hanfu with layered silk, classical garden or palace backdrop, soft lantern light, ink wash atmosphere. (B) 旗袍佳人: fitted qipao with embroidered fabric, 1930s Shanghai backdrop, warm tungsten light, Art Deco elements. (C) 国潮混搭: traditional elements fused with modern streetwear, bold red-gold palette, graphic patterns, editorial energy. (D) 水墨意境: ink painting style, monochrome with selective color (red plum blossom, golden accessories), misty mountain or bamboo forest backdrop. Clothing must show: fabric texture (silk sheen, embroidery detail, tassel movement), historically accurate garment structure. Skin: luminous but realistic, classical beauty standards without plastic surgery look.
presets.example: 上传自拍生成汉服古风写真：流云发髻、丝绸汉服、古典园林背景、灯笼暖光。

presets.title: 年龄变换
presets.prompt: Transform the age appearance of the person in the uploaded portrait while preserving their core facial identity (bone structure, eye shape, nose shape, lip shape, face proportions). Direction: {features} — specify YOUNGER (remove 10-15 years: smoother skin with natural texture, slightly fuller features, brighter eyes, more defined jawline, contemporary hairstyle) or OLDER (add 10-15 years: natural wrinkles at expression lines, slightly thinner face, distinguished gray streaks or salt-and-pepper hair, mature confident expression). Key rules: (1) Same person must be recognizable at the new age. (2) Skin aging must be anatomically accurate — crow's feet, nasolabial folds, forehead lines appear in natural locations. (3) Hair aging follows realistic patterns — temples first, then diffuse. (4) No plastic surgery look — aging is graceful and natural. (5) Keep same lighting and background as original.
guardrails: 衰老/年轻化要符合解剖学
presets.example: 上传自拍看看年轻 10 岁的样子：皮肤更紧致、轮廓更分明，但完全认得出是本人。

presets.title: 艺术风格化
presets.prompt: Convert the uploaded portrait into a fine art style painting while preserving the subject's identity. Style direction: {features} — options include: (A) 水彩: transparent washes, visible brush strokes, wet-on-wet blending, paper texture, color bleeding at edges, white paper showing through. (B) 油画: thick impasto texture, rich saturated colors, visible palette knife strokes, Rembrandt or Sargent lighting, canvas weave texture. (C) 素描: graphite or charcoal drawing, precise cross-hatching, tonal range from white paper to deep black, paper grain texture, smudge effects for softness. (D) 波普艺术: bold flat colors, Ben-Day dots, high contrast, Warhol/Lichtenstein style, graphic outlines, limited color palette. (E) 新中式: ink wash with selective red-gold accents, calligraphic brush strokes, rice paper texture, negative space composition. Each style must: maintain recognizable identity, show authentic medium texture, have coherent artistic composition.
guardrails: 构图要完整不是半成品
不要 AI 味的塑料渲染
presets.example: 上传自拍变成油画肖像：厚涂笔触、伦勃朗光影、画布纹理，但完全认得出是本人。

presets.title: 形象照修型
presets.prompt: Create an optimized professional portrait from the uploaded reference. Preserve exact facial identity. Apply subtle body and posture refinements: (1) Posture: straighten spine, pull shoulders back naturally, elongate neck, align head tilt. (2) Proportions: slight elongation of torso and limbs (5-8% max, must look natural), improve head-to-body ratio. (3) Clothing fit: smooth fabric wrinkles, improve drape and silhouette, ensure garments look tailored. (4) Face: no reshaping of features — only improve lighting, angle, and expression to flatter. (5) Hands: natural relaxed position, correct any awkward finger placement. (6) Background: clean and simple, complement outfit. Key rule: all changes must look like a skilled photographer's work, NOT digital manipulation. The person should look like themselves on their best day.
presets.example: 上传日常照优化体态：改善站姿、微调比例、服装更合身，像专业摄影师拍出来的效果。

presets.title: 宠物写真
presets.prompt: Create a professional pet portrait from the uploaded pet photo. Preserve exact pet identity: breed characteristics, fur color and pattern, eye color, facial markings, body size and proportions, unique features (cropped ear, missing tail spot, etc.). Style direction: {features} — options include: (A) Studio portrait: clean backdrop in {brand_colors}, soft beauty light, sharp focus on face and eyes, professional pet photography quality. (B) Outdoor adventure: natural setting (park, beach, forest), golden hour backlight, action or candid pose, bokeh background. (C) Holiday theme: seasonal props (Christmas, Chinese New Year, birthday), festive colors, playful expression. (D) Human-style portrait: pet in clothing or accessories, anthropomorphic pose, studio lighting, humorous yet premium quality. Fur/feather texture must be detailed and realistic. Eyes must be sharp with visible catchlights and natural reflections.
presets.example: 上传宠物照片生成高级棚拍写真：纯色背景、柔光、毛发根根分明、眼神有光。

presets.title: 婚纱写真
presets.prompt: Create a wedding portrait from the uploaded reference. Preserve exact facial identity and body proportions. Outfit direction: {features} — options include: (A) Classic white wedding: flowing white gown with lace or tulle detail, veil, bridal bouquet, soft romantic lighting. (B) Formal suit: tailored black or navy suit, crisp white shirt, tie or bow tie, pocket square, confident stance. (C) Chinese wedding: red qipao or traditional wedding attire with gold embroidery, auspicious motifs, red and gold color scheme. (D) Pre-wedding casual: coordinated couple outfits, relaxed natural setting, candid romantic moment. Venue/backdrop: {brand_colors} — grand ballroom, garden, beach sunset, city rooftop, or studio with draped fabric. Lighting: soft romantic with warm tone, rim light on hair and dress, gentle fill. Skin: luminous and healthy, visible texture, bridal glow without plastic filter.
presets.example: 上传单人照生成婚纱大片：白纱、花束、柔和逆光、浪漫氛围，像专业婚纱摄影。

presets.title: 宝宝写真
presets.prompt: Create a professional baby/child portrait from the uploaded reference. Preserve exact child identity: facial features, skin tone, hair, expressions, and age-appropriate proportions. Style direction: {features} — options include: (A) 百天照: baby lying on soft fabric, pastel props (teddy bear, wooden letters, milestone card), soft natural light, overhead or 45-degree angle. (B) 周岁照: cake smash theme, colorful backdrop, frosting and crumbs, joyful messy expression, festive energy. (C) 节日主题: Chinese New Year (red outfit, gold accessories, lanterns), Mid-Autumn (rabbit theme, mooncake props), or seasonal themes. (D) 户外自然: garden, flower field, autumn leaves, natural light, candid play moment. Skin: baby-soft but with natural texture (baby acne, milk spots are OK), no adult beauty retouching. Expression: genuine — laughing, curious, sleepy, playful. Safety: no props that look hazardous, no uncomfortable poses.
presets.example: 上传宝宝照片生成百天写真：柔和光线、粉色织物、小熊道具、自然微笑。

presets.title: 职业形象照
presets.prompt: Create a professional corporate headshot from the uploaded portrait. Preserve exact facial identity. Optimize for: (1) Attire: {features} — options include: dark suit with white/blue shirt, business casual (blazer + open collar), tech casual (clean solid-color sweater or polo), creative professional (smart casual with personality). (2) Background: solid neutral (white, light gray, dark gray, navy) or very subtle office environment blur. (3) Lighting: professional studio — large soft key light at 45 degrees, fill light to reduce shadows, hair/rim light for separation, even background illumination. (4) Expression: confident approachable smile or serious determined look, direct eye contact with camera, relaxed jaw. (5) Crop: head and shoulders, face centered, top of head visible, slight space above head. (6) Grooming: neat hair, clean skin, no distracting accessories. Output: sharp, well-lit, professional — suitable for company website, LinkedIn, resume, press kit.
presets.example: 上传自拍生成 LinkedIn 职业头像：深色西装、浅灰背景、柔和光线、自信微笑。

presets.title: AI 抠图去背景
presets.prompt: Extract the main subject from the uploaded image and remove the background completely. Output: the subject on a pure transparent background (PNG with alpha channel). Precision requirements: (1) Hair: must extract individual flyaway hairs and wisps accurately, no halos, no background color fringing on hair edges. (2) Clothing: clean edges around fabric textures, lace, sheer materials, and fur. (3) Skin: smooth natural edge transition, no jagged cutout lines. (4) Accessories: preserve glasses, jewelry, watches with clean edges. (5) Shadows: remove cast shadows on background, optionally keep contact shadows under feet/hands for realism. (6) Edge quality: anti-aliased edges, no pixelation, no rough stair-stepping. If multiple people: extract all as one group or specify which person. Output format: PNG with transparent background, high resolution, print-ready quality.
presets.example: 上传人物照片，AI 精确抠出人物，去除全部背景，输出透明 PNG。

presets.title: AI 换背景
presets.prompt: Replace the background of the uploaded portrait with a new scene while keeping the subject perfectly intact. New background: {features} — options include: (A) 海边日落: tropical beach, golden hour, gentle waves, warm backlight matching subject. (B) 都市夜景: city skyline, bokeh lights, cool blue-purple tones, cinematic atmosphere. (C) 办公室: modern minimalist office, large window light, professional environment. (D) 花海: flower field (lavender, cherry blossom, sunflower), soft natural light, dreamy depth of field. (E) 自定义: describe any scene in {features}. Integration rules: (1) Lighting on subject must match new scene direction and color temperature. (2) Subject must cast realistic shadows in new environment. (3) Edge blending around hair and clothing must be seamless. (4) Color grading must unify subject and background. (5) Depth of field must be consistent — if background is blurred, subject stays sharp.
guardrails: 主体光线必须匹配新背景
presets.example: 上传证件照，把背景换成海边日落：人物光线自动匹配暖色调，发丝边缘自然融合。

presets.title: AI 消除杂物
presets.prompt: Remove unwanted objects or people from the uploaded photo and fill the area with contextually appropriate background. Describe what to remove in {features}: e.g., 'background tourists', 'power lines', 'trash can', 'photobomber', 'watermark', 'text overlay'. Removal rules: (1) Identify the specified objects and remove them completely. (2) Reconstruct the background behind removed objects using surrounding context — continuation of patterns, textures, architecture, landscape, sky. (3) Maintain consistent lighting, shadows, and color across the filled area. (4) Preserve all details of the main subject — do not touch the person/product in the foreground. (5) If removing people from a crowd, fill with realistic crowd texture or blurred background. (6) If removing text/watermark, reconstruct the underlying surface texture. Output: same resolution as input, seamless removal with no visible artifacts or repeated patterns.
guardrails: 填充区域要符合上下文
presets.example: 上传景区照片，描述「背景中的路人」，AI 自动消除并用天空和建筑补全。

presets.title: AI 换天空
presets.prompt: Replace the sky in the uploaded outdoor photo with a new sky scene. New sky: {features} — options include: (A) 晴空万里: deep blue sky with scattered white cumulus clouds, bright but not harsh. (B) 晚霞火烧: dramatic orange-red-purple sunset clouds, warm golden light on foreground. (C) 乌云密布: dramatic dark storm clouds, moody atmosphere, rays of light breaking through. (D) 星空银河: night sky with Milky Way, stars, subtle blue-purple gradient. (E) 彩虹: rainbow arc after rain, wet surfaces, fresh clean atmosphere. Integration rules: (1) Sky replacement must adjust foreground lighting to match — color temperature, direction, intensity. (2) Horizon line must be natural with no visible seam. (3) Sky must be reflected in any water/glass/metal surfaces in the scene. (4) Foreground elements (trees, buildings, people) must cast shadows consistent with new sky's sun position. (5) Overall color grading must unify sky and ground. (6) Preserve all foreground detail exactly.
guardrails: 水面/玻璃要有天空倒影
presets.example: 上传阴天户外照，换成晚霞火烧云天空：前景自动获得暖色夕阳光线，水面反射橙红。

presets.title: AI HDR 修复
presets.prompt: Restore the dynamic range of the uploaded photo that has exposure problems. Diagnosis and repair: (1) Overexposed areas: recover blown-out highlights — restore cloud detail in white sky, recover texture in bright clothing, bring back skin detail in overexposed faces. (2) Underexposed areas: lift shadow detail — reveal details in dark backgrounds, brighten faces in backlit situations, recover color in silhouetted areas. (3) Mixed lighting: balance bright windows with dark interiors, handle spotlit subjects against dark backgrounds. Processing rules: natural-looking result, NOT the garish over-processed HDR look. Preserve: original mood and atmosphere, film grain if present, natural contrast relationships. Add: subtle local contrast enhancement, micro-detail recovery, color saturation correction. Avoid: halo artifacts around high-contrast edges, noise amplification in shadows, color shifts in skin tones, cartoon-like tonemapping.
guardrails: 修复要自然不要HDR过度感
presets.example: 上传逆光过曝的人像照，AI 恢复天空细节和暗部肤色，保留自然光影关系。

presets.title: AI 划痕修复
presets.prompt: Repair physical damage on the uploaded old or damaged photograph. Damage types to fix: (1) Scratches: linear marks from handling, nail scratches, surface abrasions — remove while preserving underlying image detail. (2) Creases/folds: diagonal or horizontal fold lines with cracking — smooth and reconstruct image continuity. (3) Water damage: stains, warping patterns, discoloration patches — correct color and tone in affected areas. (4) Mold/foxing: brown spots, fungal growth patterns, age spots — remove while maintaining paper texture. (5) Torn/missing areas: reconstruct plausible image content for small missing patches using surrounding context. (6) Fading: restore contrast and color density to faded photographs. Processing rules: preserve original film grain and paper texture, maintain the period-appropriate aesthetic, do NOT modernize the image style. If the photo is black-and-white, keep it black-and-white unless specifically asked to colorize. Output at same or improved resolution with damage artifacts removed.
guardrails: 修复损伤但不重画内容
缺损区域的补全要合理
presets.example: 上传有折痕和水渍的老照片，AI 自动修复所有损伤，保留原始画面内容和年代感。
